text: "Ephraim"... That is, the kingdom of the ten tribes.—The head of the fat valley: Samaria, situate on a hill, having under it a most fertile valley.
"Command, command again."... This is said in the person of the Jews, resisting the repeated commands of God, and still putting him off.
"A stone in the foundations."... That is, Christ.—Let him not hasten. Let him expect his coming with patience.
"The bed is straitened."... It is too narrow to hold two. God will have the bed of our heart all to himself.
"As in the mountain."... As the Lord fought against the Philistines in Baal Pharasim, 2 Kings 5., and against the Chanaanites, in the valley of Gabaon, Jos. 10.
"This also."... Such also is the proceeding of the Lord with his land, and the divers seeds he throws therein.
